requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC, and Smart-Charging Integration

summary.en: Networked Cape Verde chargers should be prepared for OCPP back-office interoperability, remote monitoring, load management, fault reporting, and renewable-rich island grid operation where required by the project owner or operator. EMC evidence should follow the IEC 61000 family and the relevant IEC 61851 product requirements. Radio, cellular, Wi-Fi, payment, or smart-metering functions may add telecommunications, cybersecurity, and metering requirements.
summary.zh: 佛得角联网充电桩应根据项目业主或运营商要求，准备OCPP后台互操作、远程监控、负载管理、故障报告以及适配高可再生能源岛屿电网运行的能力。EMC证据应遵循IEC 61000系列及相关IEC 61851产品要求。无线、蜂窝、Wi-Fi、支付或智能计量功能可能引入电信、网络安全和计量要求。
summary.zht: 維德角聯網充電樁應根據項目業主或運營商要求，準備OCPP後台互操作、遠程監控、負載管理、故障報告以及適配高可再生能源島嶼電網運行的能力。EMC證據應遵循IEC 61000系列及相關IEC 61851產品要求。無線、蜂窩、Wi-Fi、支付或智慧計量功能可能引入電信、網絡安全和計量要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charging
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
ARME telecommunications, electricity, and economic regulation where applicable

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and vehicle battery-management system. That CAN-based vehicle communication is not a substitute for OCPP back-office integration, nor for CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication when required. China EMC reports may need clause-level comparison against IEC 61000 and IEC 61851 EMC expectations.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信协议。该CAN总线车辆通信不能替代OCPP后台集成，也不能替代在要求时使用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信。中国EMC报告可能需要与IEC 61000和IEC 61851 EMC预期进行逐条对照。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。該CAN總線車輛通訊不能替代OCPP後台集成，也不能替代在要求時使用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊。中國EMC報告可能需要與IEC 61000和IEC 61851 EMC預期進行逐條對照。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.2 and China EMC test evidence where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charger-management platform, cellular or Ethernet requirements, SIM and data arrangements, cybersecurity expectations, remote load-management functions, and IEC EMC test evidence for the exact project. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation is not ready for networked Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认具体项目所需的OCPP版本、充电桩管理平台、蜂窝或以太网要求、SIM和数据安排、网络安全预期、远程负载管理功能以及IEC EMC测试证据。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩，不适用于联网Type 2 / CCS2部署。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認具體項目所需的OCPP版本、充電樁管理平台、蜂窩或以太網要求、SIM和數據安排、網絡安全預期、遠程負載管理功能以及IEC EMC測試證據。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁，不適用於聯網Type 2 / CCS2部署。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by project owner, charge-point operator, public tender, ARME/ELECTRA condition, or networked charging platform; IEC EMC evidence is normally expected for IEC-family EVSE
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle communication and is not an OCPP or IEC EMC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate the evidence streams: OCPP is for back-office interoperability, IEC 61000 / IEC 61851 evidence is for EMC, and GB/T 27930 is China DC vehicle communication. They are not interchangeable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应区分证据流：OCPP用于后台互操作，IEC 61000 / IEC 61851证据用于EMC，GB/T 27930是中国直流车辆通信。三者不能互相替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應區分證據流：OCPP用於後台互操作，IEC 61000 / IEC 61851證據用於EMC，GB/T 27930是中國直流車輛通訊。三者不能互相替代。
